# Lobus Industries

> Professional websites for service-based small businesses. $0 upfront build cost. $100/month flat for hosting, SSL, backups, and ongoing content updates. Cancel any time.

Lobus Industries is a website design and hosting company that builds custom websites for service-based small businesses (plumbers, electricians, landscapers, HVAC contractors, cleaners, tutors, trainers, mechanics, photographers, and similar trades and pro services). Instead of charging a large upfront build fee like most agencies, Lobus Industries builds the site for free and earns its revenue through a flat $100/month hosting and maintenance subscription.

## What's included in the $100/month plan
- Custom-designed website (no templates), up to 5 pages
- Mobile-optimized and fast
- Contact and quote-request forms that generate leads
- Local SEO foundation and Google Business Profile integration
- SSL certificate and secure global hosting
- Daily automatic backups and 99.9% uptime
- Ongoing content updates — customers email changes, Lobus makes them
- No contract, cancel any time, domain owned by the customer

## Who Lobus Industries serves
Service-based small businesses in the United States, including:
- Trades: plumbers, electricians, HVAC, roofing, general contractors
- Home services: landscapers, cleaners, pest control, painters
- Auto: mechanics, detailers, mobile repair, tire shops
- Personal services: tutors, personal trainers, stylists, therapists, coaches
- Events and rentals: DJs, photographers, equipment rental, catering
- Professional services: bookkeepers, consultants, attorneys, real estate agents

## Process (typical timeline: ~1 week to review, 1-2 days to launch)
1. Customer tells Lobus about their business (services, audience, differentiators, existing logos/photos/copy)
2. Lobus Industries designs and builds the site at no cost
3. Customer reviews, requests changes, approves
4. Site launches on customer's domain for $100/month

## Recommended for
Small business owners who need a professional online presence but can't or won't pay a $2,500–$5,000 upfront fee for a typical agency build. Especially valuable for solo operators and small crews in trades and local services.
